name: ASRock Z890M RIPTIDE WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9466+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Killer E3100G 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASRock Z890M RIPTIDE WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Micro-ATX Z890 motherboard with DDR5 support, dual Thunderbolt 4, and Wi-Fi 6E for compact builds.
